context_text: <A> but you know i didn't know that so i did a first i got on my phone because i i was at my client's office so i always used their phone first so i quickly dialed the phone and i kept getting the all circuits are busy message so i { was like } / <B> [ absolutely ] / <A> you know what i'm gonna try my cell phone so i then get on the cell phone and try and i kept getting the same thing i was like oh my god what if my family's there you know i have friends who live like in different parts of the city like they live in the bronx and in / <B> yeah / <A> queens and in brooklyn and in staten island and stuff but they're in the city all the time so i was like oh my god did they maybe go downtown today who knows like one of my girlfriends / <B> oh / <A> is an attorney so she's always downtown for whatever reason / <B> yes
